ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sip_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each SIP transaction */,
  "num_requests" INTEGER /* Number of requests in the transaction */,
  "num_responses" INTEGER /* Number of responses in the transaction */,
  "initiating_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that initiated the transaction */,
  "ending_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that ended the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "transaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the transaction in milliseconds */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the SIP protocol used */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the initiating client */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the initiating node */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the ending node */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the initiating node */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the ending node */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., INVITE, REGISTER, BYE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sip_transactions_ending_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("ending_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sip_transactions_initiating_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiating_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., S-CSCF, MTAS) */,
  "node_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the node */,
  "node_status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "node_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "node_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the node */,
  "node_version" TEXT /* Software version of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_types" (
  "node_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node type */,
  "node_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the node type */,
  "node_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the node type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_initiators" (
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction initiator */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that initiated the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the SIP transaction */,
  "initiator_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the initiating node */,
  "initiator_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the initiating node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_initiators_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_initiators_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sip_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_enders" (
  "ender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction ender */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that ended the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the SIP transaction */,
  "ender_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the ending node */,
  "ender_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the ending node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_enders_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sip_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_enders_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network administrator, engineer, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction data */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the SIP transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sip_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the SIP transaction */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., anomaly, error) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sip_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("alert_resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the SIP transaction */,
  "analytic_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytic was generated */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., traffic volume, transaction time) */,
  "analytic_value" REAL /* Value of the analytic */,
  "analytic_status" TEXT /* Status of the analytic (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "analytic_source" TEXT /* Source of the analytic data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sip_transactions ("transaction_id")
)
